Description:
Ballistics of the 3UOF17 <<Basnya-2>> HE-Frag round with the 3OF32 projectile from the 100mm 2A70 gun. Barrel length is 3505 mm, case is 192 mm long, projectile travel approximated as 3320 mm. Projectile weighs 15.6 kg and loads 1.69 kg of A-IX-2. Cartridge loads 261 gram of propellant, of which 255 gram is 4/1 nitrocellulose at a nitration of 13.18% (f ~1029.4 J/g). 

Russian specification: [copper crusher gauge]
Temp 	P.mcp 	M.V.
     	kgf/cm²	m/s
15°C	1870	250 (+/- 5) m/s
50°C	2200

Chinese tests: [copper crusher gauge]
Temp	P.mcp	M.V.
	MPa	m/s
 -40°C	162.4	252.6
  15°C	172.1	255.4 
  50°C	197.5	258.7

Reference:
 - 段梅，胡振乾，陈俊武，倪庆杰《100mm杀爆弹性能特点分析》
 - 韩晓红，郭德惠《100mm杀伤爆破弹发射装药剖析》
 - 王景明，王帮秀《100mm杀爆弹钢药筒特征分析》
 - 王育维，魏建国，龚海钢，郭德惠《100mm杀爆弹两相流内弹道模拟》
 - 龚海刚，周圣棋，魏建国，韩小红《100mm杀爆弹发射装药性能分析》(Adopts k factor of 17% due to projectile 7% weight of barrel's recoiling parts, as a fitting parameter.)
